PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOYRD, ABRAHAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERTZ CLAIMS MANAGEMENT $15,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $15,000.00, ON AWARD OF ARBITRATOR- PLAINTIFFS ABRAHAM BOYD AND STEVEN TOWNSEND TO RECOVER $7500 EACH.
